_comment: Reference config for Mac's ~/.claude/settings.json. Mirrors the PC integration but with Mac-native paths. Merge these mcpServers + env entries into your existing settings.json — don't blindly overwrite (you may have other servers configured).
_notes: 1. Replace YOUR_MAC_USERNAME with your actual Mac username (check with `whoami` in Terminal)
2. If repo is NOT at ~/trading, adjust mes-repo path + MES_REPO_ROOT
3. After editing, fully quit + relaunch Claude Code (so MCPs respawn)
4. Verify: in a fresh session, the MCPs mes-brain / brain-files / mes-repo should appear
5. On Mac, env vars also need to be exported in ~/.zshrc for other tools (uvx, npx scripts): see block below
_shell_env_vars_for_zshrc: # Add these to ~/.zshrc so uvx/npx and other tools see the paths:
